# CTSubscriberTokenRefreshed

**Global Variable**

The name of the notification indicating that the carrier token is available.

## Declaration

```swift
let CTSubscriberTokenRefreshed: String
```

## Discussion

The notification’s [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSNotification/object] property is the [doc://com.apple.coretelephony/documentation/CoreTelephony/CTSubscriber] instance whose subscriber token refreshed.

## Managing the carrier token

- **carrierToken**: A data object containing authorization information about the subscriber.
- **refreshCarrierToken()**: Attempts to refresh the carrier token.
